description_long: This object is an open hardcover book, with one side displaying a page filled with neatly aligned lines of text and the other side showing a closed block of pages. The book's cover appears to be a deep maroon or burgundy color, with a visible spine and a slightly textured surface. The open page features a decorative border in each corner, giving it a formal or ceremonial appearance. The pages are thick and cream-colored, suggesting high-quality paper, and the book is relatively large and square-shaped. The interior binding is visible at the center, with a hint of a ribbon or fabric marker. The overall design is elegant and classic, suitable for a special edition or commemorative volume.
description: A large, open hardcover book with a maroon cover, thick cream pages, and decorative borders on the visible text page.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the bottom edge, showing the open page with text and decorative corners, and the closed block of pages on the right.
description_view_1: A direct side view reveals the open book with one page exposed and the other side closed, highlighting the maroon cover and the book's thickness.
description_view_2: Viewed from the top edge, the closed block of pages is prominent, with the open page and its text partially visible in the background.
description_view_3: This view shows the open page with text on the right and the closed block of pages on the left, with the book's spine and cover visible in the center.
